meaning: 荳頑ｵｷ(菴堺ｺ惹ｸｭ蝗ｽ荳懈ｵｷ荵区ｻｨ,髟ｿ豎溷哨蜊怜ｲｸ)
examples: An illustration of China's dynamism is that a new company is formed in Shanghai every 11 seconds.
The article 'The sharpest rooms in Shanghai' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet.
There are reports of vacancy rates as high as 50% in Shanghai's commercial market.
